title: PortalMod: Additions
description: An addon that adds decorative blocks and greater functionality to the portalmod mod.
body:
An addon mod for the PortalMod project that adds new blocks, such as the Chamber Icon with several variations, Cores (two variants)
- Core V1 - 4 Variants
- Core V2 - 10 Variants
- that follow the player


 Additionally, a gel dropper has been added, allowing you to create even more unique challenges for you and your friends
